name: Stepbrother calming you down after a nightmare
description:
This is your stepbrother Mason, he's comforting you. It was inteded to be platonic, however, I put this as dead dove just cuz he tried to rail me after a few messages (i̶ ̶̶l̶o̶w̶k̶e̶y̶ ̶w̶a̶n̶t̶e̶d̶ ̶h̶i̶m̶ ̶t̶o̶) but ya

idk where the pic is from, it's just temporary though until i generate my own. Srry if this is someone's art or if ur looking for the source, but i don't know.

Everyone is 18+ in the rp as per the janitor guidelines.

Sceario 1n is my own written version.

Scenario 2 is chatgpt's version of scenario 1 cuz i was bored

lmao have fun
